info.name: Collections — Photos
info.description: Photo upload endpoint. Accepts multipart/form-data with a 'file' field (image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp, or image/gif, max 10 MB). Returns a URL that can be included in the photoUrls array when creating or updating a collection item.

formdata.description: Image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF — max 10 MB)

request.description: Upload a single image file. Returns { url: "/uploads/<filename>" }. Use the returned URL in the photoUrls array when creating or patching a collection item.
Serve a previously uploaded image. Replace REPLACE_WITH_FILENAME with the filename returned from the upload endpoint. No auth required — served as static files by ServeStaticModule.
